# Yuchen Water — approved public facts

This file contains only public facts approved for machine-readable use. It does not
replace a model-specific quotation or technical datasheet.

## Company and contact

- Name: Yuchen Water
- Website: https://www.yuchensy.com/
- Email: expresswater025@gmail.com
- Telephone and WhatsApp: +86-19908311885
- Address: Yuanhua Town, Haining, Zhejiang, China

## Public product scope

Yuchen Water publishes product pages for water filter cartridges, water filter
housings, reverse-osmosis water purifiers and treatment equipment, and water
dispensers. A page describes only the visible product or configurable product
family shown on that page.

## Latvian configurable filter-housing family

Canonical page: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/product-housing-filter.html

Approved facts:

- Cartridge lengths: 10 inches or 20 inches.
- Housing formats: Slim or Big Blue/Jumbo.
- Housing variants: blue, black or transparent.
- Stage options: one, two or three housings in sequence.
- Installation options: wall bracket or metal floor frame, confirmed per order.
- Optional items: pressure gauge, housing wrench and installation accessories,
  confirmed for the selected configuration.
- A quotation requires the size, format, stage count, housing variant, mounting
  method, required accessories, quantity, packaging requirements and destination.

Related intent-specific pages:

- Category overview: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/filter-housing.html
- Three-stage Big Blue configuration: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/product-big-blue-3stage.html

## Limits on interpretation

- Photographs show configuration examples; visible accessories are not automatically
  standard equipment for every model.
- The approved scope is limited to the listed sizes, formats, colors, stage options,
  mounting choices and selectable accessories.
- Confirm the selected model, accessories, quantity, packaging and destination for
  the requested configuration.
